---
category: evergreen
title: The 10-minute weekly finance review that stops founder cash surprises
audience: Bootstrapped SaaS founders
problem: They notice runway issues too late because reporting is scattered
source: Support calls and founder office hours
why_now: Teams are cutting spend and need tighter weekly visibility
hook: If your runway math lives in your head, you are already late
content_type: tactical walkthrough
evidence: Repeated request pattern in founder communities and CFO teardown notes
risk_level: low
---
category: authority-building
title: Why most pricing pages hide the one number buyers actually compare
audience: B2B startup marketers
problem: They optimize copy but ignore the comparison anchor buyers notice first
source: Sales call reviews and pricing page teardowns
why_now: Teams are reworking pricing as acquisition costs rise
hook: Buyers do not start with your features, they start with your anchor
content_type: contrarian breakdown
evidence: Consistent objection pattern across recent demo reviews
risk_level: medium

Rejected ideas: 2
Rejection reasons:
- Too broad for a single short-form video
- Needed claims we could not verify quickly
